ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city's geographical location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city's geographical location */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code of the country the city is located in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city (in meters) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city's data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the city's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES city_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city in that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate for the given year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_developments" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban development project */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the project is located */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the urban development project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Description of the expected impact of the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_developments_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the device and browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source of the data */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability rating of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city statistic entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the statistic */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city (people per km²) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city's statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_statistics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city image */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city represented by the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the city image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the image data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_images_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
